equipmentMods.horn: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves increase their damage by 5% with each leap.
equipmentMods.trinket: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves now leap an additional times.

equipmentMods.bracer: Containers in ruptures have a chance to drop large gems.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.

equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 25% damage and a bonus +5% for every additional orb.
